---
# First/last seen per entity with earliest()/latest()

`comp earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen, count() as c by <entity>` gives each entity's activity window in one pass (verified on real network telemetry: per-process first/last connection + count). A brand-new `first_seen` inside the incident window, or a process active for only a few seconds, are both worth a look. Add `| alter active_s = timestamp_diff(last_seen, first_seen, "SECOND")` to rank by dwell time.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null
| comp earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen, count() as conns by actor_process_image_name, action_remote_ip
| alter active_s = timestamp_diff(last_seen, first_seen, "SECOND")
| sort desc conns
```

_Stage/function syntax live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (Advanced-auth PAPI, narrow window). The mechanics are confirmed; adapt field names to your dataset._
